tweets.author: bit-by-bitcoin.bsky.social
tweets.text: Every 10 minutes, like clockwork, a new block of Bitcoin transactions is confirmed and added to the permanent record. It has happened without interruption since January 2009. No bank holiday stops it. No server outage pauses it. No government decision delays it.
